properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who is the man to whom the Lord will have regard He who is broken and has a humble heart God is not impressed with the loftiness of man For everything was made for Him, And comes from His own hand.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So… Humble yourself before your Lord and King Give Him your heart, offer your everything There's no limit, on the love He has for you So humble yourself and see what God will do.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Who are the people that the Lord will bless Those who love and fear Him and seek His righteousness Nothing else in all the world can satisfy your soul But the One who made the universe He longs to make you whole.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If My people humble themselves and pray, I will hear them, lead them in My ways.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So Humble yourself and let Him have His way. Love His Word and His will obey. For His eyes are on the one whose heart is true So humble yourself and see what God will do.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Humble yourself before your Lord and King Give Him your heart, offer your everything There's no limit, on the love He has for you So humble yourself and see what God will do.
